title: Professional Wash Boy Tile Cleaning Set Kit with Bucket, Floor Grate, Float with Grouting Tiling Sponge, and Accessories for DIY or Pro Contractor Installs, Glazing, and Cleaning.
features: Professional Glazing Kit – Great for do-it-yourself installers and professional contractors, this wash boy tiling set comes with everything you’ll need to do the job right, including a 20L bucket with wheels, grid rollers, and accessories.

Heavy-Duty Tiling Bucket – Each tile cleaning toolkit comes with a premium-grade polypropylene plastic bucket with stable roller installation system to give you more support and control when laying and cleaning tile or grout.

Compact and Portable System – Offering portability and convenient for small, medium, and large jobs this professional wash boy tiling set works in the bathroom, kitchen, or entryway areas, so you can keep it handy on every job site

Lightweight Grouting Trowel – We’ve included a high-quality grout trowel to help with laying and managing your tile and grouting work, which helps reduce install times and improves overall efficiency and end condition

Easy to Clean and Reuse – Ideal for all your personal DIY or professional tiling and grout jobs, our heavy-duty plastic tools and accessories can be washed and cleaned for reuse. This helps reduce waste and improves long-term tiling value.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Hardware > Adhesives & Sealers > Tile Grout
